name: Tariq Osei
goals: Systematically test how category combinations affect model output quality and consistency
Share reproducible prompt configurations with teammates and document results
Understand the underlying prompt schema well enough to extend or override it programmatically
frustrations: No URL-based state sharing — must screenshot or copy-paste to reproduce a configuration
Prompt history is ephemeral; losing a good combination means starting over
Opaque LLM expansion step with no streaming feedback — hard to know if it's working
relevant_behaviours: Treats each session as an experiment: fixes most categories and varies one at a time
Wants to deep-link to a specific selection state to share with colleagues
Reads the raw expanded prompt text critically and compares it across multiple generations
Would use an export/import feature for prompt configs if it existed
